description: Document of sale dated 456 AH. Marqūrah and Buṭrus are purchasing from ʿUqayl ibn Ḥudayj ibn Aḥmad who is introduced in the document as the field guard of Ṭuṭūn. His father’s name appears in one of the documents from ʾUqlūl where he appears as a witness. It seems that later on ʿUqayl moved to Ṭuṭūn, perhaps for work. They bought from him two feddāns of black (fertile) land for the price of eight dīnārs (see Chrest. Khoury II 20). The seller’s great grandfather is mentioned in the document. The northern border of the land extends to the property of Rababil ibn Mina with an additional information "alladhī ishtarāhu min Ḥamīd ibn Khayrī al-ʿĀmirī". (information from Shomali, "Arabic Legal Documents")
description_he: שטר מכירה מתוארך ל-456 להג'רה. מרקורה ובוטרוס רוכשים מ'עוקיל בן חודייג' בן אחמד, שומר שדה מטוטון, שתי פדאן אדמה שחורה (פוריה) תמורת שמונה דינארים
